## 📝 Pull Request Description

This pull request introduces foundational documentation to standardize development workflows, contribution practices, and pull request management for the KingKen Global Recruitment Platform.

These additions improve collaboration, maintain consistency across the codebase, and prepare the repository for scalable team contributions.

---

## 📁 Files Added

| File                               | Description                                                                                                         |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md`                  | Defines branching strategy, naming conventions, commit standards, pull request workflow, and development guidelines |
| `.github/pull_request_template.md` | Provides a structured PR template including change type classification, branch validation, and pre-merge checklist  |

---

## 📊 Type of Change

* [x] 📖 `docs` — Documentation update
* [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature
* [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
* [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code refactoring

---

## 🌿 Branch Checklist

* [x] Branch follows naming convention (`docs/branching-strategy`)
* [x] Branch created from `develop`
* [x] Commits follow Conventional Commits format

---

## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

* [x] Documentation reviewed for clarity and accuracy
* [x] No application logic changes introduced
* [x] File structure verified and aligned with repository standards
* [x] Ready for merge into `develop`

---

## 🚀 Impact

* Establishes a standardized development workflow
* Improves onboarding for future contributors
* Enhances repository structure and maintainability
* Prepares project for scaling and team collaboration

---

## 📌 Notes

This PR focuses strictly on documentation and does not introduce any functional or runtime changes.
